message:
✨ Enforce kubestellar.io preview URL for Copilot testing

Update the AI fix workflow to instruct Copilot to use the canonical
kubestellar.io preview URL instead of raw Netlify URLs when testing
with Playwright.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -149,9 +149,11 @@ jobs:
           - Use Go for backend code
 
           ### Testing Requirements:
-          - **You MUST use Playwright to test the Netlify preview deployment**
+          - **You MUST use Playwright to test the preview deployment**
           - Do not just take screenshots - actually interact with the UI
-          - Navigate to the Netlify preview URL and verify your changes work end-to-end
+          - **IMPORTANT: Use the kubestellar.io preview URL, NOT the raw Netlify URL**
+            - Use: \`https://console.preview.kubestellar.io/pr/{PR_NUMBER}/\`
+            - Do NOT use: \`deploy-preview-*--kubestellar-console.netlify.app\`
           - Test all user interactions (clicks, inputs, etc.) that your changes affect
           - Verify the expected behavior occurs after each interaction
           EOF
@@ -181,9 +183,11 @@ jobs:
           - Use Go for backend code
 
           ### Testing Requirements:
-          - **You MUST use Playwright to test the Netlify preview deployment**
+          - **You MUST use Playwright to test the preview deployment**
           - Do not just take screenshots - actually interact with the UI
-          - Navigate to the Netlify preview URL and verify your changes work end-to-end
+          - **IMPORTANT: Use the kubestellar.io preview URL, NOT the raw Netlify URL**
+            - Use: \`https://console.preview.kubestellar.io/pr/{PR_NUMBER}/\`
+            - Do NOT use: \`deploy-preview-*--kubestellar-console.netlify.app\`
           - Test all user interactions (clicks, inputs, etc.) that your changes affect
           - Verify the expected behavior occurs after each interaction
           EOF
